creator: wood_elf@126.com
text:
When I use portupgrade to upgrade gnome-packgekit from version 2.30.3 to 2.32.0, the following error occured when building:

** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20101128-48124-17lk8zg-0 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=gnome-packagekit-2.30.3 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=2.30.3 make

Seems that it's some problems with docbook2man, right? But I do not know how to fix this. Please give some help. Thank you all.
